blended.narrative: Pico Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 56°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: light rain showers, highs of 55°F.
Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
